title: Western blot
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d0qhi","text":"The protein levels of BRC tissue and MTSs was detected via western blot.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"dq3oo","text":"- Cold RIPA lysis buffer (Beyotime)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"muij2","text":"- BCA protein assay kit (Beyotime)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"868bg","text":"- 10% SDS-PAGE gels","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"psje2","text":"- Polyvinylidene difluoride (PVDF) membranes (Merck)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"x3ax2","text":"- 5% skim milk","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jqmqa","text":"- HRP-conjugated secondary antibodies","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"s1th7","text":"- Fujifilm LAS 4000 luminescent image analyzer (Fujifilm Life Science)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"pjogo","text":"- Quantity One software (Bio–Rad)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xayjb","text":"- Primary antibodies against PARP1, Bax, Actin, NF-κB, p-NF-κB, P38, p-P38, β-Catenin, full-length and cleaved caspase-3 (CST)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"g9yhp","text":"- Primary antibodies against GAPDH, Notch1, CD44, CD24, ALDH1A1, P53, PCNA, c-Myc, YAP (Proteintech Company)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eb8mq","text":"- Goat anti-mouse or anti-rabbit HRP-conjugated secondary antibodies (Beyotime Company)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Harvest and lyse tissues or sorted MTSs from MWC-chips in cold RIPA lysis buffer (Beyotime).
Centrifuge at 12,000 rpm for 15 min at 4°C.
Clarify lysates and collect supernatants for protein concentration determination using the BCA protein assay kit (Beyotime).
Fractionate proteins on 10% SDS-PAGE gels and transfer to polyvinylidene difluoride (PVDF) membranes (Merck).
Block PVDF membranes with 5% skim milk at room temperature for 1 hour.
Apply HRP-conjugated secondary antibodies to membranes for an additional hour.
Visualize blots using chemiluminescence and photograph using Fujifilm LAS 4000 luminescent image analyzer (Fujifilm Life Science).
Quantify grayscale values using Quantity One software (Bio–Rad).
creator: Guangli Suo
